idea-plugin.name: Chalk
idea-plugin.description:
Chalk provides language intelligence and typechecking for Chalk projects.

  • Python semantic analysis and diagnostics
  • Navigation for Chalk SQL resolvers
  • Validation for chalk.yml and chalk.yaml
  • Managed, checksum-verified installation of chalk-lsp
  • Project-root isolation and suppression of competing built-in Python type inspections

The language server starts only for files beneath a Chalk project root. Server updates are explicit and independent of plugin releases.

Documentation · Source code · Issue tracker
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Unreleased

  • Run the native chalk-lsp through JetBrains' LSP API.
  • Install and update the server with checksum verification and safe replacement.
  • Add Chalk settings, status, restart, update, and log actions.
  • Scope server activation and Python inspection suppression to Chalk roots.

action.description: Download the latest Chalk language server and restart it
Restart Chalk without checking for updates
